info.description: This API documentation includes the endpoints for the NiFi controller on Digi-Belize.
info.title: av_controller_digibelize

get.summary: This endpoint is used to perform a balance check for a given MSISDN.
get.description: This endpoint is used to perform a balance check for a given MSISDN. Business Errors: Since the payment feed is offline, the balances in the Airvantage databases will momentarily be out of sync with the balances at Digi Belize from time to time. As such, we have accounted for two possible error responses 1) 200_business_error_1: This is a response obtained when the subscriber's balance reigistered at Airvantage is greater than that at Digi Belize i.e av_balance > belize_balance 2) 200_business_error_2: This is a response obtained when the subscriber's balance reigistered at Airvantage is less that at Digi Belize i.e av_balance < belize_balance

parameters.name: msisdn
parameters.description: The MSISDN unique to the subscrier.

get.summary: This endpoint is used to check the status of an advance and if a subscriber is eligible for an advance.
get.description: This endpoint call retrieves the status of an advance in av_microservice_lending. Based on the statusId returned from av_microservice_lending we can determine if the subscriber for example has a historic advance, etc. The controller response codes are as follow: 101 - Subscriber does not have an active advance. 102 - Subscriber has an active advance. 105 - Error with the response from the lending or integration microservices. 106 - Business error. Business Errors: Since the payment feed is offline, the balances in the Airvantage databases will momentarily be out of sync with the balances at Digi Belize from time to time. As such, we have accounted for two possible error responses 200_business_error_1: This is a response obtained when the subscriber's balance reigistered at Airvantage is greater than that at Digi Belize i.e av_balance > belize_balance 200_business_error_2: This is a response obtained when the subscriber's balance reigistered at Airvantage is less that at Digi Belize i.e av_balance < belize_balance

parameters.name: msisdn
parameters.description: The MSISDN that is uniquely associated with the subscriber.

get.summary: This endpoint is used to add and process an advance for a subscriber.
get.description:
The process advance endpoint can be called by av_microservice_ussd to add an advance to the advance table of av_microservice_lending.

The av_controller_digibelize will first check if the subscriber doesn't have an open advance, etc. The getAdvanceStatus endpoint will be called on av_microservice_lending.

If the subscriber doesn't have an advance the controller will be held responsible for adding the advance and sending a advance confirmation SMS to the subscriber.

parameters.name: entityType
parameters.description:
This is the type of recharge being made. 
1 - MoMo 
2 - Airtime
3 - Data

default: 2

parameters.name: loanAmount
parameters.description: The amount the subscriber wants to borrow.

parameters.name: loanDate
parameters.description: The date that the loan is taken. The format of the date should be yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss

parameters.name: msisdn
parameters.description: The MSISDN unique to the subscrier.

parameters.name: rechargeAmount
parameters.description: The amount that the recharge will be done for.

parameters.name: serviceAmount
parameters.description: The service fee amount that is allocated to AV for granting the recharge amount. Usually dynamic.

parameters.name: qualifiedAmount
parameters.description: The amount that the subscriber qualified for from av_microservice_profiler.

parameters.name: channelId
parameters.description:
1- UNKNOWN
2 - USSD
3 - SMS
4 - ZERO BALANCE

default: 1
